name: Vegan Hot Cocoa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Better Than Milk (or similar soy milk substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mug, mix together the soy milk substitute, sugar, and salt until well combined.
2. Add a few tablespoons of tap water to the mixture and stir until dissolved.
3. Carefully add boiling water and stir until smooth.
4. Enjoy your hot cocoa!
